nodes.label: Our Environment
nodes.description: Living and non-living things and how they work together

nodes.label: Living Things
nodes.description: Things that grow, breathe, eat, move, and reproduce

nodes.label: Plants
nodes.description: Living things that make their own food using sunlight

nodes.label: Animals
nodes.description: Living things that eat plants or other animals for food

nodes.label: Non-living Things
nodes.description: Things that do not grow, breathe, or reproduce

nodes.label: Natural
nodes.description: Non-living things found in nature: water, air, rocks, sunlight

nodes.label: Man-made
nodes.description: Non-living things made by humans: chairs, books, cars

nodes.label: Ecosystems
nodes.description: Communities where living and non-living things interact

nodes.label: Habitats
nodes.description: Natural homes: forest, desert, pond, ocean

nodes.label: Food Chain
nodes.description: How energy flows: producer to consumer to decomposer

nodes.label: Producers
nodes.description: Plants that make their own food using sunlight

nodes.label: Consumers
nodes.description: Animals that eat plants or other animals

nodes.label: Decomposers
nodes.description: Break down dead things and return nutrients to soil
